title: JAGAHM
description: This is just another growth and harvest mod
body:
This mod targets any plants.

When holding shift all crops in a 2 block radius will grow way faster than any mod for 1.20 can grow them.

NEW content:

- radius configable

- crop speed configable

- compat for mystical agriculture crops (when not using agricraft!)

- add right click harvesting (1.20+ feature only!) (has been backported to older versions) 

- disable functionalities (1.20.2+ NeoForge feature only!) (has been backported to older versions)

- Poop item and Fart sound (1.20.2+ NeoForge feature only) (has been backported to older versions)

Config file is jagahm.toml (NEW since 1.21, before it was called AgriGrowth.toml)
